response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable Java proficiency in professional contexts, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds senior roles inconsistent with an entry-level position, raising concerns about role fit, cultural alignment, and language compliance.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong contributions to open-source and community education (workshops, talks)
Proven track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting required fluency
No clear evidence of Java usage in professional projects despite listing it as a skill
Senior-level titles and experience far exceed entry-level role expectations
